intro: Between April 12 and 20, 2026, ZCyberNews tracked 23 ransomware incidents, with the majority rated as high severity. The threat actor Payouts King was the most frequently reported, alongside activity from Interlock and RansomHub. A key vulnerability exploited during this period was CVE-2026-34197, which carries a CVSS score of 8.8. The attacks primarily targeted the healthcare, logistics, manufacturing, and retail sectors, with notable impact across Europe, the United States, Turkey, and the Netherlands, as well as incidents with a global footprint.
